name: Sicilian Italian Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Italian sausage, raw, cut into 1-1/2 inch chunks
16 oz VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Italian sausage in olive oil until it is no longer pink.
2. Add onions and garlic to the pan and sauté until the onions are soft.
3. Stir in tomato paste, diced tomatoes, VEG-ALL mixed vegetables with liquid, oregano, basil, and red wine into the sausage mixture. Allow the sauce to simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish and sprinkle grated Italian cheese on top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
